about.headline: Professional vehicle photography — without the studio
about.subheadline: We built AutoStudio AI because high-quality car photography should not require a dedicated studio, expensive equipment, or days of scheduling. It should take seconds.
about.whatWeDoBody: AutoStudio AI uses artificial intelligence to remove backgrounds from vehicle photos and replace them with professional studio environments. Upload a photo of any car — taken on a phone or with a camera — and receive a polished, dealership-ready image in under 30 seconds.
about.whatWeDoBody2: We offer multiple studio styles suited to every vehicle and brand: bright white showrooms, dark dramatic settings, urban environments, and more. Every output is optimised for the web, marketplace listings, and print.

features.feature3: HD and 4K export for web and print
features.feature4: Custom logo branding on every image

about.problemBody: A professional automotive photoshoot typically requires a dedicated studio, lighting rigs, a photographer, and post-production editing. For a single vehicle this can cost thousands of SEK and take days to schedule — before a single listing goes live.
about.problemBody2: AutoStudio AI compresses that workflow to a few seconds and a fraction of the cost. Dealerships can process their entire inventory in an afternoon, maintain consistent visual identity across every listing, and update images whenever a vehicle is detailed or rephotographed.

manageSubscription.title: Manage Subscription

usageBasedBilling.title: Usage-Based Billing
usageBasedBilling.subtitle: Need more than your plan includes? We offer flexible pay-as-you-go pricing for extra usage.

changePlans.question: Can I change plans anytime?
changePlans.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate any differences.

exceedLimit.question: What happens if I exceed my monthly limit?
exceedLimit.answer: You'll be charged for extra usage at our pay-as-you-go rates. We'll notify you when you're approaching your limit so there are no surprises.

rollover.question: Do unused generations roll over?
rollover.answer: No, unused generations reset at the end of each billing cycle. We recommend choosing a plan that matches your typical monthly usage.
